title: Anchorage Heavy Rain
lead: Anchorage is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.91. The city is under a critical weather alert with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Anchorage is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The rain is expected to continue throughout the day with humidity levels at 87% and wind speeds of 7.4 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 14.7 GG and CDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical weather event.
